learnings.insight: The project doesn't have a 'typecheck' npm script. Use 'npx tsc --noEmit' for TypeScript validation, or 'npx tsc --noEmit src/path/to/file.ts' to check specific files.
When running eslint from the frontend directory, use paths relative to that directory (e.g., 'npx eslint src/generated/types.ts'), not full paths from the workspace root.
The 'frontend/src/generated/' directory exists and is the designated location for shared types across the application.
The pre-commit hook runs Agent Learnings Destiller, Pattern Validation, and Playwright tests. Commit messages are validated with 'conventional commit' format.

ALWAYS follow implement-tasks.md workflow for every US, even simple tasks. Steps: 1) Create progress.md before starting, 2) Run Gate via subagents (@tdd-playwright, @verify-patterns), 3) Run typecheck + lint, 4) Register in progress.md, 5) Return to human for review BEFORE committing. NEVER commit directly without human approval. Only commit after human approves.
After completing a US successfully, ALWAYS update tasks.md and set 'Passes: true' for that US. This step was missing from the implement-tasks prompt and caused US-001 to remain with Passes: false.

Validation GR-006 (component without props typing) falsely flagged components that import props from external files. Fix: update pre-commit-validate.js to recognize external Props imports with regex pattern /import\s+(?:type\s+)?\{[^}]*Props[^}]*\}/

When a component (like Header) is in the layout AND also rendered in the test page, use .first() on locators to avoid strict mode violation. Also ensure test page doesn't manually render components that are already in the layout.
CRITICAL: Always show git status + git diff to human BEFORE committing distill. Wait for human confirmation 'Confirma o commit da destilação?' before executing the commit. Never commit automatically.

After US completion, implement-tasks must: 1) Update tasks.md with Passes: true, 2) Execute first commit (agent-learnings destillation), 3) Execute global destillation (progress.md -> specs/docs/*), 4) Show files to human, 5) Wait confirmation, 6) Execute second commit, 7) Clear progress.md
E2E tests belong in frontend/tests/features/[feature]/[us-id].spec.ts. When component is already in layout, test page should NOT re-render the component to avoid duplicates.
